stemHtml:
When transporting a passenger who has to be at a certain destination for a meeting. The weather forecast at destination tends to be much worse than expected. The pilot considers to divert. The businessman offers him/her money if he/she manages to land there at any case.

The appropriate way of action is:

options.a: To decide to divert if he/she thinks it is necessary.
options.b: To analyse what you he/she can do and ask the copilot to tolerate his/her decision.
options.c: To continue and think about the nice things he/she can buy for the money.
options.d: To divert in any case to demonstrate who is the person in charge aboard.
